arts.ttl: “Your move, West Ham” – Collymore throws down the gauntlet as spectre of Moyes return looms
arts.sum: It’s true that Julen Lopetegui hasn’t enjoyed the best start to his West Ham career. Far from it in fact. His Hammers team has looked slow, disjointed and disinterested, and if the Spaniard isn’t careful, he could quickly find himself unemployed again. arts.ttl: West Ham considering £25 million offer for versatile attacker Julen Lopetegui loves
arts.sum: West Ham are interested in signing a versatile and exciting attacker and see Lyon’s Rayan Cherki as the ideal player. The 21-year-old Frenchman has long had a reputation for being one of Europe’s most high-potential players. arts.ttl: Mohammed Kudus on east London, love from the Ghanaian community and the new Cockney KIt
arts.sum: Kudus played a prominent role in the Kit's launch ahead of the new campaign, heading down to Clapton's Accra Palace restaurant for a photoshoot showcasing east London's links with his native Ghanaian community. “I had heard about the restaurant [Clapton’s Accra Palace] but had never been before and that was my first time, but I got a really good impression.

arts.ttl: West Ham top the most unwanted league table as Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham all in top ten
arts.sum: West Ham United topped the football arrest league for England and Wales last season. West Ham also top the list of clubs for new banning orders issued against fans with 49 in total.

arts.ttl: “Very bad” | Lopetegui injured in Hammers loss
arts.sum: West Ham manager Julen Lopetegui reportedly sustained an injury due to his frustration at his sides 5-1 Carabao Cup defeat to Liverpool away at Anfield. arts.ttl: “No doubt” | Stuart Pearce says West Ham must give Lopetegui more time
arts.sum: Ex-West Ham player Stuart Pearce says that Julen Lopetegui must be given time. The large majority of West Ham fans whether they were Moyes in or Moyes out were not happy with the appointment of Julen Lopetegui.
